mapper.sql: id, card_id, source_id, source_file_id, card_type, answer_shape, title, claim, items_json::text as items_json, evidence_text, source_chunk_ids, article_ids, confidence, review_status, content_hash, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: insert into fact_cards ( card_id, source_id, source_file_id, card_type, answer_shape, title, claim, items_json, evidence_text, source_chunk_ids, article_ids, confidence, review_status, content_hash, search_tsv ) values ( #{record.cardId}, #{record.sourceId}, #{record.sourceFileId}, #{record.cardType,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.FactCardTypeHandler}, #{record.answerShape,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.AnswerShapeTypeHandler}, #{record.title}, #{record.claim}, #{record.itemsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.evidenceText}, #{record.sourceChunkIds,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.LongListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.articleIds,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.LongListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.confidence}, #{record.reviewStatus,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.FactCardReviewStatusTypeHandler}, #{record.contentHash}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}) ) on conflict (card_id) do update set source_id = excluded.source_id, source_file_id = excluded.source_file_id, card_type = excluded.card_type, answer_shape = excluded.answer_shape, title = excluded.title, claim = excluded.claim, items_json = excluded.items_json, evidence_text = excluded.evidence_text, source_chunk_ids = excluded.source_chunk_ids, article_ids = excluded.article_ids, confidence = excluded.confidence, review_status = excluded.review_status, content_hash = excluded.content_hash, search_tsv = excluded.search_tsv, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP returning
select from fact_cards order by updated_at desc, id desc
select from fact_cards where source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} order by card_type asc, title asc, id asc
select card_type as count_key, count(*)::integer as card_count from fact_cards group by card_type order by card_type asc
select review_status as count_key, count(*)::integer as card_count from fact_cards group by review_status order by review_status asc
select count(*) from fact_cards where cardinality(source_chunk_ids) = 0
